{{Missing Info}}

==Dimensional Energy Cube==

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Dimensional Energy Cube
|Rarity=red
|ID Number=80
|Initial HP=130
|HP Increase=30
|Initial ATK=13
|ATK Increase=3
|Initial DEF=13
|DEF Increase=3
|Initial RUSH=13
|RUSH Increase=3
|Effect 1=Fire DMG +###
|Initial Effect Value 1=3
|Effect Value Increase 1=3
|Effect 2=Wind DMG +###
|Initial Effect Value 2=3
|Effect Value Increase 2=3
|Effect 3=Home Facility Resource Max Cap +###%
|Initial Effect Value 3=0.5
|Effect Value Increase 3=0.5
|Effect 4=Home Facility Resource Outputs +###%
|Initial Effect Value 4=0.5
|Effect Value Increase 4=0.5
|}}

==Source==
[[Unispark Lottery|Unispark Lottery]] after maxing [[Universe Energy Cube]]

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Red Organs]]
